title: Diagnose Misconfigured Infrastructure
description: A production web application is experiencing intermittent 502 errors and high latency. Diagnose and fix the infrastructure issues.
scenario: You are a Cloud Engineer on-call. The monitoring dashboard shows 502 errors spiking to 15% and p99 latency at 8 seconds. Review the infrastructure configuration below and identify all issues.
issues: Health check interval too long (300s) — unhealthy instances serve traffic too long
Scale-out cooldown too long (600s) — can't respond to traffic spikes fast enough
CPU threshold too high (90%) — should trigger at 60-70%
Single AZ deployment — no fault tolerance
t2.micro too small for production workload
No caching layer — all requests hit database
RDS max connections too low (66) — connection pool exhaustion
No backup retention — data loss risk
questions: List all infrastructure issues you can identify and their severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low).
What is the most likely root cause of the 502 errors right now?
Write a prioritized remediation plan for the next 24 hours.
What would the ideal architecture look like for this workload?
evaluationCriteria: Spots single AZ as availability risk

title: Cost Optimization Architecture Review
description: Review a cloud architecture and identify cost optimization opportunities without sacrificing reliability.
scenario: A startup is spending $12,000/month on AWS. Their CTO wants to cut costs by 40% without impacting availability. Review their current setup and propose optimizations.

currentArchitecture.environments: Production and staging use identical infrastructure

trafficPattern: Business hours only (9am-6pm weekdays), near-zero traffic nights/weekends
questions: What are the top 5 cost optimization opportunities?
How would you handle the staging environment differently?
What Reserved Instance or Savings Plan strategy would you recommend?
How would adding a CDN impact both cost and performance?
evaluationCriteria: Recommends CDN for data transfer costs
